chunks.texto:
This   procedure   purpose   is   to   describe IUI's   Intranet   Client   use   for 13189   -   DOW Tarragona Project.

Especially the following points:

-Project electronic folder management.

-Every project role access to the information. IUI's staff, partners, suppliers and client staff

-Documents import and management.

IUI owns technology to integrate the whole company's information flow. This technology is managed by Documentum 4i, a powerful Document Manager with the following properties and functionalities:

Intranet/Internet oriented system: Using a standard browser (Internet Explorer, i.e.) you can create, modify or browse any project document. Using a web environment ease remote information access.

Indexed information: for   every   document   there   are   properties   (document   id.,   title, description…) that provide a direct link to documents and search services and tools.

Information easy access: Advanced search using documents attributes. Through the folder structure you can link documents making them available from different locations (the same document)

Information security and Integrity: automatic security procedures based on access list checking (ACL: Access Control List) for documents and folders defining every user groups   privileges.   (read,   write,   delete...).   This   system   guarantees   that   every   user accesses allowed information and provides error protection.

Version management: when you modify any file (document) you can overwrite (loosing the original NOT APPROVED VERSION if you are allowed) or keep the older version in the documents base. This option provides you an accessible document life cycle history.

Electronic messenger: Improves users' communication attaching documents to the message (usually the attached document is the message itself)

IUI owns technology to integrate the whole company's information flow. This technology is managed by Documentum 4i, a powerful Document Manager with the following properties and functionalities:

Intranet/Internet oriented system: Using a standard browser (Internet Explorer, i.e.) you can create, modify or browse any project document. Using a web environment ease remote information access.

Indexed information: for   every   document   there   are   properties   (document   id.,   title, description…) that provide a direct link to documents and search services and tools.

Information easy access: Advanced search using documents attributes. Through the folder structure you can link documents making them available from different locations (the same document)

Information security and Integrity: automatic security procedures based on access list checking (ACL: Access Control List) for documents and folders defining every user groups   privileges.   (read,   write,   delete...).   This   system   guarantees   that   every   user accesses allowed information and provides error protection.

Version management: when you modify any file (document) you can overwrite (loosing the original NOT APPROVED VERSION if you are allowed) or keep the older version in the documents base. This option provides you an accessible document life cycle history.

This option provides you an accessible document life cycle history.

Electronic messenger: Improves users' communication attaching documents to the message (usually the attached document is the message itself)

Lifecycles and workflows management. Lifecycles is a document attribute to describe document state; it's always attached to the document and any state of document lifecycle (creation, approval, customer revision) is reflected in an attribute change.

These  state   changes   are   automated   in workflows .   You   can   program   the   flow   of approval: a sequence of users (recorded in a register) approves the document for its final approval.

Multi-format   purpose: You   can   import   documents   in   their   original   format (AutoCAD .dgn, excel .xls, word .doc....) and it's available to include, attached to the original or by its own, an standard electronic document publisher (Acrobat .pdf)
chunks.seccion: PORTAL USE PROCEDURE PROJECT 13189 - DOW Tarragona

chunks.texto:
 Customer documents:

o Technical   documents. Basic   Engineering,   specifications   and   standards, previous installation drawings…

o Purchasing and subcontract documents: requests for quotation, commercial evaluations, orders…

o Detail Engineering documents : drawings, specifications, data sheets…

o Requisition of Material and Requisition of Construction ( Material Supply and Subcontracts ).

o General documents: Progress reports, meetings, quality program

 Suppliers' documents.

All of the project documents will be imported to the Document Base by IUI's staff and will be available for the whole company with the permissions developed, avoiding not allowed access to the information.

The main point in e-business is security; we have two Document Bases isolated by a firewall: one for intranet and the other for Internet. Everyday we make a copy of the intranet content to the Internet Document Base so we can provide remote access to the information to our customers, suppliers, partners...
chunks.seccion: All of the project documents will be imported to the Document Base:

chunks.texto:
We provide two customer accesses, one for resident customer staff and the other for remote access using Internet:

 Resident customer staff may access to the whole project documents without any restriction although documents are not still approved. They will also be involved in the approval flow.

 Internet access. Remote information access is available through Intecsa Uhde web site ( http://www.intecsauhde.com/web/english/root.htm )   entering Project Cooperation Zone (http://194.179.91.198/rs-bin/RightSite.dll/ssi4.htm )

This link allows access to all of the approved project documents (or the ones that approval is not required), during the approval process (workflow) you will not be able to access it but you could view previously approved versions.

Using Business Center Access in   Intecsa   Uhde   web   site   suppliers   will   find   all   of   the Material   Supply   documents related   to   them   either   in   Inquiry   phase   or   Order   phase. Business Center information security is guaranteed by an access code list (user name and password) for the suppliers managed by the Project Administrator so just the request for quotation invited suppliers or the order selected ones may view the information

Every document created by Intecsa Uhde will   be   imported   to   the   Document   Base   by document's creator and it would be electronically approved and distributed if necessary. The Project Administrator who will be also responsible for the project electronic cabinet management will import customer documents . The Project Administrator will also be the one responsible for the supplier documents management, importing them into the Document Base when they arrive at Intecsa Uhde, and when they are sent back to the suppliers with comments.

As we said before Project Administrator will   manage the project electronic cabinet, in especial he/she is the person in charge of:

-Electronic Documents distribution.

-Customer documents importation to the Document Base

-Material Supply documents attachment to ease suppliers' access to the information.

-Supplier's user names and passwords management for   controlling IUI's Business Center access.

-Project Electronic Cabinet management: error detection, documents properties and permissions supervising.

-Suppliers' documents dispatch record.

-When it's needed to work with heavy lots of documents (importing or extracting from the Document Base) he/she will be able to use specific tools.

Project Administrator is in charge of:

-Supplier expediting

-Document import to the Document Base. (Arrival)

-Make documents available for the engineers in charge of the order.

-Import documents once IUI staff comments them so documents and their comments are available for the project staff, client and the involved supplier.

The structure design is oriented to:

 Quick information access.

 Improve permissions management and ease documents modifications.

Indexing criteria is oriented firstly to documents type (customer documents, mailing...) and later different departments or activities.

The MS is developed in a matrix structure, this means, documents have several locations:

 Documents are generated and imported to their technical folder,  for   example,   and Isometric drawing will be located at:

 And if the document is attached to a Material Supply document, it will be linked (not copied) to that material supply document folder:

7.0. MATERIAL SUPPLY and RELATED DOCUMENTS

MSs DOCUMENTOS. MS - .......

See APENDIX 1 for the complete project structure and its access permission level to the information contained.

Documentum (Doc. Base) users are organized in user groups so permissions (ACL. Access Control Lists) are given to these groups. To guarantee information security you just need to include agents in their appropriate group.

For any modification in project team, permissions, or for updating (include new agents or delete old ones) Project Management must contact Knowledge Management.
 -Proy_dow_lectura: for not confidential documents not approved yet.

In   the intranet it   allows   READING   TO   any   IUI   users   and   MODIFYING   TO   just document's owner and Project Administrator.

 Proy_dow_dirección: for Project Managers eyes-only. In the intranet it allows READING TO Project Management and MODIFYING TO just document's owner.

 Proy_dow_escritura: for not confidential documents not approved yet.

In the intranet it allows READING TO any IUI users and MODIFYING TO any Project Team user.

 Proy_dow_privado: for Project Management and Project Cost Reporting Leader eyesonly.

In the intranet it   allows   READING TO Project Management, Project Cost Reporting Leader and Department Managers and MODIFYING TO document's owner

 Proy_dow_plan_privado: for   cost   reporting,   change   orders   and   economical   curves documents.

In the intranet it   allows READING TO Project Management and contracts team and MODIFYING TO planning team

 Proy_dow_plan_restringido: for project's situation documents (SIPO) In the intranet it allows READING TO Project Management and Department Managers

and MODIFYING TO planning team

 Proy_dow_plan_scsi: for engineering services control system (SCSI) In the intranet it allows READING TO Project Management, Project Department Leader

and Department Managers and MODIFYING TO the document's owner.

 Proy_dow_restringido: for   Project   Management,   Department   Managers,   Project Department Leader eyes only.

In the intranet it allows READING TO Project Management, Department Managers and Project Department Leader and MODIFYING TO document's owner

 Proy_dow_operaciones: for general documents imported by the operations team. In the intranet it   allows   READING TO any IUI users and MODIFYING TO just the

operations team or Project Administrator.

These are the general permissions, the followings are all of them quite similar, they allow, for each Department or Activity in the Project, to IMPORT and MODIFYING TO documents for those activity group teams and READING TO any of IUI staff

 Proy_dow_civil: for any document created by Architectural and Civil. In the intranet it allows READING TO any IUI users and MODIFYING TO just Project Architectural and Civil Team.

 Proy_dow_compras: for any document created by Procurement In the intranet it allows READING TO any IUI users and MODIFYING TO just Project Procurement Team.

 Proy_dow_compras_rest: for orders and economical evaluation documents. In the intranet it allows READING TO Project Management, Department Managers and

Project Department Leaders and MODIFYING TO just Project Procurement Team.

 Proy_dow_construc: for any document created by Construction In the intranet it allows READING TO any IUI users and MODIFYING TO just Project Construction Team.

 Proy_dow_construc_rest: for orders and economical evaluation documents. In the intranet it allows READING TO Project Management, Department Managers and

Project Department Leaders and MODIFYING TO just Project Construction Team

 Proy_dow_dinamicos: for any document created by Rotating Equipments

In the intranet it allows READING TO any IUI users and MODIFYING TO just Project Rotating Equipment Team.

 Proy_dow_elecinst: for any document created by Electrical or Instruments In the intranet it allows READING TO any IUI users and MODIFYING TO just Project Electrical and Instruments Team.

 Proy_dow_estaticos: for any document created by Static Equipments. In the intranet it allows READING TO any IUI users and MODIFYING TO just Project

Static Equipments Team.

 Proy_dow_hvac: for   any   document   created   by   HVAC   (Heating,   Ventilation   and   Air Conditioning).

In the intranet it allows READING TO any IUI users and MODIFYING TO just Project HVAC Team.

 Proy_dow_materiales: for any document created by Piping Materials In the intranet it allows READING TO any IUI users and MODIFYING TO just Project

Piping Materials Team.

 Proy_dow_procesos: for any document created by Process In the intranet it allows READING TO any IUI users and MODIFYING TO just Project Process Team.

 Proy_dow_sci: for any document created by SCI (Fire Protection System) In the intranet it allows READING TO any IUI users and MODIFYING TO just SCI Team.

chunks.texto:
Here we have the complete project folders structure and we also describe with the following codes their content access permissions

ctm: customer users.

pm: project management

cost : project cost registration Leader.

pdl: project department Leader

dm: department managers

iui: Intecsa Uhde staff

For example, pm + cost + dm means Project Management, Project Cost Registration Leader, Department Managers are allowed to access to folder content.
